---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature, integration, or workflow improvement
title: '[feature] '
labels: feature-request
assignees: ''
---

## What you want to do

A clear, concrete description of what you're trying to accomplish.

> Example: "I want to connect Nexus to a private Google Sheet (currently it only works on public ones)."

## Why this matters / what you'd do with it

The use case, ideally with an example workflow.

> Example: "Our CRM exports go to a private team Sheet. I can't move that to a CSV without breaking our update flow, so private Sheets support is the unlock."

## What you've tried so far

(Optional) Workarounds, hacks, or related tools you're using today.

## Proposal (optional)

(Optional) How you'd imagine the API / CLI / UX. Just a sketch — don't over-spec.

> Example: `nexus connect "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/...PRIVATE..."` would prompt for OAuth on first run, then cache the token in `~/.nexus/auth/google.json`.

## Anything else

Screenshots, related issues, links — anything that helps.
